raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX I went to XXXX XXXX XXXX station located at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, NY XXXX to put some gas in my car. I have been using this gas station for a while. 
I gave my AMEX credit card to the young guy in the pump, he asked for the Zip code and he proceeded to put the gas. The total amount of the transaction was {$35.00}. 
By XX/XX/XXXX I received a text from AMERICAN EXPRESS verifying a transaction this day from the same company by {$250.00}. I texted right away that I didn't authorize this transaction. 
I went online to check my account and I realized there were 2 transactions made for this same company : One for {$300.00} made on XX/XX/XXXX and a second one for {$250.00} made on XX/XX/XXXX. 
I called customer service and I told the representative that I didn't recognize those XXXX transactions and that it must be a fraud. She told me that AMEX is going to investigate the issue. 
I called XXXX spoke with another representative. He, this time, cancelled my CC and told me that he is reporting these 2 transactions as Fraud. I will contact the Police also.
